feedback: Initial run. Focus on finding strong stories across all 4 categories. Prioritize visual trends and interesting campaigns. Include production technique stories that would interest camera/imaging professionals.

First run completed June 22, 2026. 12 stories seeded across all 4 categories. Top stories: DJI Pocket 4P launch and DJI vs Insta360 patent war (both score 9). Freshest stories are within the 14-day window. Several stories included as first-run seeds despite being older (GoPro MISSION 1, DJI Avata 360, visionOS 26).

Second run completed June 23, 2026. 6 stories found across production (4) and visual_trends (2). No campaigns or creator_study stories found at sufficient quality. GoPro going-concern is top story (score 9). Next run should explicitly search creator campaign angles.
